title: VasquezVicente/ForestLandscapes: timeWise
author: Vicente Vasquez
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Latest release includes pipelines for tree crown segmentation, drone processing, timeseries segmentation, spatial alignment of orthomosaics, training SGBT models for estimation of leaf coverage, data cloning models and more.
steps_raw: Latest release includes pipelines for tree crown segmentation, drone processing, timeseries segmentation, spatial alignment of orthomosaics, training SGBT models for estimation of leaf coverage, data cloning models and more.
